generated_oml:
instance DS18S20ThermometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor used for temperature monitoring in thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20ThermometerSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD representation of physical components in the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical differential equations model for thermal dynamics of incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, ScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQServer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server for synchronization and communication between system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, SimulationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance ScipyOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for optimization functions during model calibration processes"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation algorithm for reproducing physical twin behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance SupervisoryControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Controller for adjusting physical operations based on system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring algorithm for thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of thermal incubator system safety and performance using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight, PerformanceInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation capabilities to reproduce and predict physical twin behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithms for system efficiency and calibration"
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection mechanisms to identify anomalies in system operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation techniques to infer system states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory controllers to adjust physical operations based on system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time safety status of thermal incubator system"
]

instance PerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current performance metrics of the thermal incubator system"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted behavior of the physical twin under current conditions"
]

instance EfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized system efficiency metrics from optimization algorithms"
]

instance FaultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected faults or anomalies in system operation"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated internal states of the thermal incubator system"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to physical operations based on system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Raspberry Pi controller subscribes to RabbitMQ messages for fan and heatbed control commands, processes them, and transmits validated commands through the communication server to actuate physical components, with confirmation mechanisms ensuring accurate execution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system utilizes RabbitMQ as a central message broker for synchronization and communication, with the Controller listening for commands via RabbitMQ and the Low-level driver interfacing with sensors through a 1-Wire bus. Two distinct simulation models (Model A and Model B) are employed for calibration and prediction purposes but operate independently without data exchange."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update model parameters based on sensor data to maintain fidelity, while monitoring systems check operational safety and optimality; detected violations trigger corrective actions by humans or automated algorithms."
]
